explanation: Number of nodes in the stylised financial network.
Number of simulated scenarios. S=1 is a documentation and smoke-test run.
Number of trading days in the simulated path.
Fixed investment base used to scale routing capacity.
Shape parameter of the fallback lognormal gamma distribution.
Location parameter of the fallback lognormal gamma distribution.
Scale parameter of the fallback lognormal gamma distribution.
Quantile used to define the lower-tail liquidity-risk threshold.
Percentage of investment unavailable in the no-mitigation baseline.
Target share of evaluable liquidity-risk days detected by the EWI.
Target share of EWI signals that are true-positive signals.
Fixed number of trading days between a true EWI signal and an event.
Number of trading days between an EWI signal and support activation.
Combined additional routing-capacity support as a percentage of the investment base.
Number of trading days for which support remains active after activation.
Number of gamma-grid points used for interpolation.
